Okay, what's up guys and girls? Being able to overcome obstacles and help people make a decision is one of the most valuable pieces of being in sales. It's it is persuasion, it's using influence, it's using humor, sarcasm, anything that you can to basically I mean to influence them to make a decision and really honestly you have to see this as help. Okay you have to see this as helping someone because most people are just afraid. They're afraid of making a mistake. They're afraid of trying something and feeling which will make them feel like their status went down internally and feel like another failure and so like that's what they're afraid of and so we need to basically comfort them and assure them that this is gonna be different because of all the things that we have in place. Okay so I just want to explain to you how the percentage is usually break down. So if you have a hundred people that you see 30 of them will buy this because their buying threshold is above the actual price point. So they came in pretty much ready to buy and as long as the price is like reasonable to them which 500 bucks for a lot of people will basically convince them that what they need to do is to sign up because this is like this is gonna be this is gonna be the vacation they've been wanting and we're gonna take them there. Alright so that's the reason for the obstacles and the three main categories without further ado the obstacle handling sequence.
